title: #RebuildRadicalRick Campaign
alt: Lititz BMX campaign post announcing the completed Radical Rick figure and the approaching Rebuild Radical Rick finale.
summary: A serialized 2025 Lititz BMX campaign documenting the reconstruction of a 40th Anniversary Radical Rick figure. The campaign archive preserves 19 officially numbered episode positions, 18 verified episodes and one unresolved lost episode without reconstructing missing evidence.
provenance: The complete campaign archive is already preserved in the repository under campaigns/rebuild-radical-rick/.
claims: The collection does not duplicate the episode archive. It presents the campaign as a connected storyline and directs readers to the canonical campaign record.
details: Episode 15 preserved as The Lost Episode.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
